title: Crepidomanes novoguineense
taxonomy: Crepidomanes novoguineense, a species of fern, belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This family is part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which comprises all ferns and their allies. Within the family Hymenophyllaceae, Crepidomanes novoguineense is classified as a member of the genus Crepidomanes, characterized by its delicate and air-filled fronds. The genus Crepidomanes is further divided into several species, including Crepidomanes novoguineense, each with unique characteristics and distribution patterns. The classification of Crepidomanes novoguineense reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other ferns within the same family and genus.
